findings.description: Nested <main> landmark elements - ensure the document has at most one main landmark at top level
findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 34. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Cover page logo/image is missing from the HTML rendering
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 shows the NC Coastal Recreational Fishing License logo prominently centered. The HTML page 1 equivalent is not shown as a separate page with the cover image.

findings.description: Marine Resources Fund Balance table loses row for Agent Commission expense in the HTML version on page 2
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows Agent Commission as a separate expense row with values ($1,127,616 / $335,608 / $325,722 / $331,381 / $206,149 / $2,326,476). The HTML page 2 table cuts off at the bottom and the Agent Commission row is partially visible/truncated.

findings.description: The Marine Resources Endowment Fund Balance table in the spreadsheet version (page 3) has rows presented in a more structured format than the HTML, but the HTML separates this into distinct sub-tables losing the visual connection between sections
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 shows the Marine Resources Fund Balance and Endowment Fund Balance as continuous spreadsheet tables with clear delineation. HTML splits these into separate styled tables with different visual treatment.

findings.description: Projects Approved for Funding table has a partially cut-off row for Coastal Angling Program in the HTML
findings.evidence: PDF page 3 clearly shows 'Coastal Angling Program' with $596,575. In the HTML (page 5), the Coastal Angling Program row is cut off at the bottom of the visible table section.

findings.description: County sales tables split across multiple HTML pages maintain data integrity but the 2014 Rank column for counties with 0 sales sometimes shows blank instead of no rank
findings.evidence: PDF shows Avery county 2014 with 0 sold and no rank. Cherokee 2014 shows 0 sold with no rank. HTML matches this pattern consistently.
